title: Fix hierarchical verilation with explicit setting of default parameter value

features.name: hier_block with parameter having default value
features.description: Code should include a module marked with /*verilator hier_block*/ attribute that has a parameter with an explicit default value

features.name: parameter override with explicit default value
features.description: Code should include a parameter override where the caller explicitly sets a parameter to its default value

features.name: hierarchical name mangling with default parameter override
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical block instantiation where a parameter is explicitly set to its default value, triggering incorrect name mangling
features.snippet:
module sub #(parameter P = 42) (); /*verilator hier_block*/ endmodule
module caller(); sub #(.P(42)) i_sub(); endmodule
